title: ZIP File Extractor
description: Extract files from ZIP archives online instantly and securely.

faq.question: How do I extract a ZIP file?
faq.answer: Upload your ZIP file to Converigo, and the contents will be extracted and ready for download immediately.

faq.question: Is the extraction secure?
faq.answer: Yes, files are processed securely on our servers and automatically deleted after extraction.

faq.question: What file sizes are supported?
faq.answer: ZIP files up to 500MB can be extracted instantly on Converigo.

faq.question: Will my original ZIP file be preserved?
faq.answer: Yes, extraction doesn't modify the original ZIP file. You receive only the extracted contents.

faq.question: Can I extract password-protected ZIPs?
faq.answer: Password-protected ZIP files require the correct password for successful extraction.

faq.question: Do you support nested ZIP files?
faq.answer: Yes, nested archives within the ZIP can be extracted, though only the top level is automated.

faq.question: What happens if extraction fails?
faq.answer: If extraction fails, try re-uploading the ZIP file or checking that it's not corrupted.

faq.question: Can I use ZIP extraction on mobile?
faq.answer: Yes, Converigo works on all modern browsers on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.

about_formats.title: What is a ZIP file?
about_formats.text: ZIP is a widely-used archive format for compressing and bundling multiple files together. It's supported on virtually all operating systems and devices.

about_formats.title: Why extract a ZIP file?
about_formats.text: Extracting ZIPs allows you to access the original files, modify them, and view folder structures that were compressed into the archive.

about_formats.title: ZIP file compression
about_formats.text: ZIP files reduce storage space using lossless compression. Extracted files are identical to the originals.

cta.title: Extract ZIP files in seconds
cta.text: Upload your ZIP archive and get all files instantly.
